revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:WPSHIPS utilities|sclass}}</includeonly><!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:WPSHIPS utilities|sclass}}</includeonly><!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:WPSHIPS utilities|sclass}}</includeonly><!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:WPSHIPS utilities|sclass}}</includeonly><!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:WPSHIPS utilities|sclass}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
